tasks.db:new: deno run -A npm:dbmate@^2.28.0 --migrations-dir db/migrations --env FRUGAL_TOKENS_DATABASE_URL new
tasks.db:migrate: deno run --allow-env=FRUGAL_TOKENS_DATABASE_URL --allow-read --allow-write scripts/prepareDatabase.ts && deno run -A npm:dbmate@^2.28.0 --migrations-dir db/migrations --no-dump-schema --env FRUGAL_TOKENS_DATABASE_URL up
tasks.db:rollback: deno run -A npm:dbmate@^2.28.0 --migrations-dir db/migrations --env FRUGAL_TOKENS_DATABASE_URL down
tasks.db:status: deno run -A npm:dbmate@^2.28.0 --migrations-dir db/migrations --env FRUGAL_TOKENS_DATABASE_URL status
tasks.dev: deno run -A npm:concurrently@10.0.3 --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web 'deno task dev:server' 'deno task dev:client'
tasks.dev:server: deno task --env-file=.env db:migrate && deno run --env-file=.env --allow-env=OPENCODE_DB_PATH,CLAUDE_CODE_PROJECT_PATH,PI_SESSION_DIR,CODEX_SESSION_DIR,FRUGAL_TOKENS_DATABASE_URL,FRUGAL_TOKENS_SYNC_INTERVAL_SECONDS,SERVE_STATIC,PORT --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --watch=src/server,src/shared src/server/main.ts
tasks.start: export SERVE_STATIC=true && deno task --env-file=.env db:migrate && deno run --env-file=.env --allow-env=OPENCODE_DB_PATH,CLAUDE_CODE_PROJECT_PATH,PI_SESSION_DIR,CODEX_SESSION_DIR,FRUGAL_TOKENS_DATABASE_URL,FRUGAL_TOKENS_SYNC_INTERVAL_SECONDS,SERVE_STATIC,PORT --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net src/server/main.ts
tasks.start:api: deno task db:migrate && deno run --allow-env=OPENCODE_DB_PATH,CLAUDE_CODE_PROJECT_PATH,PI_SESSION_DIR,CODEX_SESSION_DIR,FRUGAL_TOKENS_DATABASE_URL,FRUGAL_TOKENS_SYNC_INTERVAL_SECONDS,SERVE_STATIC,PORT --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net src/server/main.ts
